calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Scott Hughes, CSR#12365. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-15-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-01-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
DANIEL LOUIS FEDER, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Theresa Gentry
SIMON SMITH, in pro per on behalf of himself individually and dba Ideele

Plaintiff counsel waived a trial by jury. The parties indicated that this matter has settled. Terms of the settlement were as follows: Defendant to pay plaintiff the sum of $5,500.00 within thirty days. Each side to bear their own costs and fees.

Judge Robert L. Dondero; Clerk: Vera Mu; Reporter: Rita Howell CSR #2542 (206)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2006 Text Ruling

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Bryan J. McCormack, Esq., appeared for Defendant. There being good cause shown why this matter did not mediate, the court ordered this hearing off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR# 11332. (212)

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2006 Continued To Mar-22-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff. Defendant's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 3/22/2006 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Set For Trial On May-15-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-26-06 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 602
